item.title: Expanding the teaching of single frequency vibration absorption to broadband attenuation using subordinate oscillator arrays via fettuccine pasta
Modeling and Estimation of Linear and Nonlinear Piezoelectric Systems
Reproducing kernel Hilbert space embedding for adaptive estimation of nonlinearities in piezoelectric systems
RKHS Embedding for Estimating Nonlinear Piezoelectric Systems
Shaping the Frequency Response Function (FRF) of a Multi-Degree-of-Freedom (MDOF) Structure Using Arrays of Tuned Vibration Absorbers (TVA)
Subordinate Oscillator Arrays: Physical Design and Effects of Error
Analysis of increased damping in arrays of attached resonators
Piezoelectric Subordinate Oscillator Arrays: Performance Recovery and Robustness to Uncertainty
Shaping the Frequency Response Function (FRF) of a Multi-Degree-of-Freedom (MDOF) Structure Using Arrays
Effect of increased damping in subordinate oscillator arrays
Estimation of Distribution Errors in Piezoelectric Subordinate Oscillator Arrays
Piezoelectric Oscillators
item.description: The vibrations and the acoustics community has been interested in a class of problems where the dynamic response of a large primary structure is modified using an array of small secondary structures. In my research, the primary structure is modeled as an oscillator, which is connected to a large number of piezo bimorphs with tip masses and shunt circuits attached to them. These piezo bimorphs along with the tip masses are referred to piezo-subordinate oscillator array or piezo-SOA. My research focuses on how prescribing the properties of the piezo-SOA and shunt circuits can be used to modify the overall system’s response. My research includes modeling and simulation in MATLAB as well as experimental validation of results. Future scope of this work would include adaptive tuning of shunt circuit parameters resonant peak cancellation. This research work was advised by Dr. Andrew J. Kurdila, Professor of Mechanical Engineering at Virginia Tech. Feel free to contact me to know more about my research.

item.title: Piezoelectric composite subordinate oscillator arrays and frequency response shaping for passive vibration attenuation
Thermodynamic variational formulations of subordinate oscillator arrays (SOA) with linear piezoelectrics
On the use of shunted piezo actuators for mitigation of distribution errors in resonator arrays
